use_cases: Display multiple subscription plans side-by-side for easy comparison
Show pricing tiers with feature differentiation for SaaS products
Highlight recommended or popular pricing options with badges
Enable users to select billing cycles (monthly/yearly) with toggle options
Convert visitors to paid customers with clear CTA buttons
ai_summary: A professional pricing table component designed to display subscription tiers and pricing plans side-by-side for SaaS and subscription-based products. Features tiered card layouts with pricing details, feature lists, and call-to-action buttons, styled with a clean flat aesthetic using Tailwind CSS utilities and class-variance-authority for consistent badge variants.
